title: bulbinella angustifolia
intro: Bulbinella angustifolia, also known as the 'Giant Golden Lilyturf' or 'Pineapple Flower', is a plant species that belongs to the Asphodelaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Bulbinella angustifolia include treating wounds, skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and even relieving symptoms of fever and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and leaves can be dried and used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures for topical application or internal use.
